data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for download event tracking.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the specific feature 'Download event tracking (success/failure/device/IP metadata)', which is not directly supported by any of the prior steps or evidence provided. While the linked use case mentions the need for download event tracking, there is no concrete evidence or API interaction that confirms this feature's implementation or existence. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of download event tracking being implemented or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
